[Helper] Subscribe to Workspace events and stream them as NDJSON

Usage: gws +subscribe [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --sanitize <TEMPLATE>   Sanitize API responses through a Model Armor template. Requires cloud-platform scope. Format: projects/PROJECT/locations/LOCATION/templates/TEMPLATE. Also reads GWS_SANITIZE_TEMPLATE env var.
      --target <URI>          Workspace resource URI (e.g., //chat.googleapis.com/spaces/SPACE_ID)
      --dry-run               Validate the request locally without sending it to the API
      --event-types <TYPES>   Comma-separated CloudEvents types to subscribe to
      --format <FORMAT>       Output format: json (default), table, yaml, csv
      --project <PROJECT>     GCP project ID for Pub/Sub resources
      --subscription <NAME>   Existing Pub/Sub subscription name (skip setup)
      --max-messages <N>      Max messages per pull batch (default: 10) [default: 10]
      --poll-interval <SECS>  Seconds between pulls (default: 5) [default: 5]
      --once                  Pull once and exit
      --cleanup               Delete created Pub/Sub resources on exit
      --no-ack                Don't auto-acknowledge messages
      --output-dir <DIR>      Write each event to a separate JSON file in this directory
  -h, --help                  Print help

EXAMPLES:
  gws events +subscribe --target '//chat.googleapis.com/spaces/SPACE' --event-types 'google.workspace.chat.message.v1.created' --project my-project
  gws events +subscribe --subscription projects/p/subscriptions/my-sub --once
  gws events +subscribe ... --cleanup --output-dir ./events

TIPS:
  Without --cleanup, Pub/Sub resources persist for reconnection.
  Press Ctrl-C to stop gracefully.
